title: Magical Mild Dutch Fish Sushi
description: A Dutch dish featuring Thai bird chili and ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients, this sushi is resinous and bouncy, with a unique blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: Prepare the sushi rice according to the package instructions and season with rice vinegar.
Cut the dutch fish into small pieces and cook in sesame oil until opaque and flaky.
Mix the cooked fish with thai bird chili, ayurvedic spice blend, and chopped scallions.
Shape the sushi rice into small balls and flatten slightly into disks.
Place a small amount of the fish mixture onto the center of each rice disk.
Fold the nori sheets in half and cut into thin strips.
Wrap each rice and fish ball with a nori strip, applying gentle pressure to form a tight seal.
Serve the sushi with pickled ginger and additional thai bird chili if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to one day.
